garages.name: Klyde Warren Park Underground Garage
garages.notes: Underground garage at park. Entrances off Pearl St or St. Paul St. Clearance needs verification.

garages.name: PARK FAST — 1925 N Pearl
garages.notes: 150+ space covered garage next to Klyde Warren Park. Arts District access.

garages.name: Perot Museum of Nature & Science Garage
garages.notes: Underground museum garage. 8'2" clearance typical.

garages.name: AT&T Performing Arts Center Garage
garages.notes: Serves Winspear Opera, Wyly Theatre. Underground.

garages.name: Park Place — 1821 N Pearl
garages.notes: Arts District parking. Clearance needs verification.

garages.name: One Arts Plaza Garage
garages.notes: Office + residential tower.

garages.name: Trammell Crow Center Garage
garages.notes: Downtown office tower.

garages.name: Dallas Museum of Art Garage
garages.notes: DMA underground garage.

garages.name: Nasher Sculpture Center Lot
garages.notes: Surface lot + valet.

garages.name: West End Marketplace Garage
garages.notes: Near JFK Memorial, Dealey Plaza, Sixth Floor Museum.

garages.name: Sixth Floor Museum / Dealey Plaza Lot
garages.notes: Serves JFK museum + West End. Ace Parking operator.

garages.name: Reunion Tower / Hyatt Regency Garage
garages.notes: Tower + Hyatt + station complex. Clearance needs verification.

garages.name: Union Station Dallas Lot
garages.notes: Amtrak/DART light rail station.

garages.name: Bank of America Plaza Garage
garages.notes: Tallest downtown tower — green outline. Underground garage.

garages.name: Comerica Bank Tower Garage
garages.notes: Downtown office tower.

garages.name: Fountain Place Garage
garages.notes: Iconic glass skyscraper.

garages.name: Galleria Dallas
garages.notes: Major mall garage. North Dallas. Indoor ice rink.

garages.name: NorthPark Center
garages.notes: Upscale mall. Surface lots mostly.

garages.name: American Airlines Center — Platinum/Lots
garages.notes: Mavs/Stars arena. Surface lots.

garages.name: Dallas Cowboys — AT&T Stadium (Arlington)
garages.notes: Arlington — surface lots. Oversized/RV OK. Note: Arlington is separate city.

garages.name: Fair Park — State Fair Lots
garages.notes: Cotton Bowl, Texas State Fair. Large surface lots.

garages.name: Deep Ellum — Main & Good-Latimer
garages.notes: Deep Ellum entertainment district garage.

garages.name: Bishop Arts District Lots
garages.notes: Mostly street + surface. Oak Cliff.

garages.name: Dallas Convention Center — Main Garage
garages.notes: KBHCCD. Multiple lots + garage.

garages.name: Cityplace/Uptown DART Station Garage
garages.notes: Under Cityplace tower + DART.

garages.name: DFW — Terminal A Garage
garages.notes: Terminal-adjacent. Clearance needs verification.

garages.name: DFW — Terminal C Garage
garages.notes: Terminal-adjacent.

garages.name: DFW — Terminal D Garage
garages.notes: International terminal garage.

garages.name: DFW — Express South (Oversized)
garages.notes: Surface lot. Oversized + RV OK. Shuttle to terminals.

garages.name: DFW — Express North (Oversized)
garages.notes: Surface lot. Oversized OK.

garages.name: Love Field — Garage C
garages.notes: Love Field DAL. Online booking for L3 only. Oversized not accommodated.

garages.name: Love Field — Garage A
garages.notes: Love Field garage A. Call 214-350-4881 for clearance confirm.

garages.name: Love Field — Economy Lot
garages.notes: Uncovered. Oversized OK.

tunnels.name: Pegasus Plaza / Downtown Pedestrian Tunnels
tunnels.notes: Downtown Dallas has an underground pedestrian tunnel system connecting office buildings. Not for vehicles.

bridges.name: Margaret Hunt Hill Bridge
bridges.addr: Woodall Rodgers Fwy over Trinity River
bridges.notes: Cable-stayed bridge. High clearance. Santiago Calatrava design.

bridges.name: I-345 — Low Underpasses (Deep Ellum)
bridges.notes: Barrier elevated freeway. Some underpasses at standard freight clearance. Demo planned long-term.

bridges.name: Commerce St Rail Underpass
bridges.notes: Near Union Station. Rail underpass. Caution for box trucks.
